results.rendered_html: manana n. thinking, reflection, meditation, thought, intelligence, understanding (esp. intrinsic knowledge or science, as one of the faculties connected with the senses,  Nir. viii, 6  = manman),  Hariv. ;  Śaṃk. ;  Sarvad.  (˚nā ind. thoughtfully, deliberately,  RV. )

results.rendered_html:
manana (von 1. man)
1〉 adj. parox. bedächtig, sorgsam: ādidrājānaṃ mananā agṛbhṇata  ṚV. 9,70,3 .
— 2〉 n. nom. act. zur Erkl. von manman  NIR. 8,6 . 10,42 . manurmananāt 12,33 . mananānmunirevāsi  HARIV. 14955 . mananāttrāṇanānmantraḥ (trāṇana!)  WEBER ,  RĀMAT. 288 . = buddhi  RĀJAN. _im_ ŚKDR.  das Denken, Nachdenken, Betrachten im Geiste  COLEBR. Misc. Ess. I, 409 .  NĪLAK. 26 .  VEDĀNTAS. (Allah.) No. 113 . 122 .  ŚAṂK. _zu_ BṚH. ĀR. UP. S. 137 . 327 . Schol. zu  KAP. 1,60 . 70 —72 . īśvara˚ das Denken an  KUSUM. 64,14 .  BHĀG. P. 5,8,28 .

results.rendered_html:
manana a. [man-lyu lyuṭ vā] Thoughtful, careful.
— naṃ
1 Thinking, reflection, meditation, cogitation; mananānmunirevāsi  Hariv. 
2 Intelligence, understanding.
3 An inference arrived at by reasoning.
4 A guess, conjecture.
